text: Cannot be a stronghold province. Action: During a conflict at another province you control - move the contested ring to this province. It is now the attacked province.
name: Shrug Off Despair

text: Interrupt: When an honored character you control would leave play - discard its honored status token instead.
flavorText: "As I swore to your father, I swear to follow you." - Kakita Yoshi
name: Pledge of Loyalty

text: Reaction: After this province is revealed, choose a character – move 1 fate from that character to another character controlled by the same player.
name: Sharing Shinsei's Wisdom

text: Eminent. (This province starts the game faceup and cannot be turned facedown. It cannot be a stronghold province.) Each other province gets -1 strength if controlled by an opponent and +1 strength if controlled by you or a teammate.
name: Ninkatoshi

text: Eminent. (This province starts the game faceup and cannot be turned facedown. It cannot be a stronghold province.) After each phase begins, reveal each facedown card in this province.
name: Kakudaira

text: Eminent. (This province starts the game faceup and cannot be turned facedown. It cannot be a stronghold province.) After setup, fill this province to 3 cards. When you would refill this province, refill it to 3 cards instead of 1.
name: City of the Rich Frog

text: Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province faceup.) Action: Move a card from one of your provinces to your stronghold province.
name: Recalled Defenses

text: Reaction: After this character wins a [conflict-political] conflict as the attacker, choose up to X characters, where X is the number of faceup provinces you control - dishonor each of those characters.
name: Kakita Yoshi

text: Action: Choose a card in a province - shuffle this card and that card into their owner's decks. Refill each province emptied by this effect faceup. (Max 1 per round.)
flavorText: "This lifetime shall prepare you for the trial to come." - Togashi Hassuno
name: Cycle of Rebirth

text: No attachments except Weapon. Rally. Action: During a conflict, if there is a Battlefield in play, choose a participating character you control - move this character to the conflict. If you do, move the chosen character home.
name: Akodo Reserve Company

text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict as the defender - resolve a ring effect that matches the attacked province's element as if you were the attacking player.
name: Garanto Guardian

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a player - turn each card in that player's provinces facedown. Then, look at them and put each of those cards into one of that player's provinces, such that each province ends up with at least one card.
name: Governor's Spy

text: No attachments except Weapon. During the first conflict each round, opponents' card effects cannot bow this character or move it.
flavorText: "It is as if each warrior of the Moto Khan's horde shares a mind with their steed." - Miya Boshin
name: White Horde Vanguard

text: Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province, faceup.) Action: Discard each card in each province, refilling each province faceup. End the dynasty phase. Then there is an additional dynasty phase, during which players do not collect fate.
name: A Season of War

text: Earth role only. Reaction: After you pass on declaring a conflict, choose an unbroken non-stronghold province you control - search the top 8 cards of your dynasty deck for a card and put it into that province faceup. Shuffle. (Max 1 per conflict opportunity.)
name: Our Foe Does Not Wait

text: Water role only. Action: During a conflict, choose a character that is participating alone on your side - that character gets +1[conflict-political] until the end of the conflict for each faceup province you control. You may remove 1 fate from that character. If you do, honor it.
name: Captivating Story

text:
Attach to an unbroken province you control.
Each time you would refill attached province with a card, instead look at the top 2 cards of your dynasty deck (4 cards instead if attached province is facedown), refill the province with 1 of those cards and discard the rest.
name: Educated Heimin

text: Sincerity. (When this character leaves play, draw 1 card.) You may play this character as an attachment on a character you control, reducing its cost by 2. If you do, it loses sincerity and gains the text: "Action: During a conflict - move attached character home."
name: Serene Ise Zumi

text: Attach to an unbroken province. Limit 1 Battlefield attachment per province. During a conflict at attached province, you may play each character in your provinces as if it were in your hand. Each character played this way must enter play in the conflict.
name: Prepared Ambush

text: Air role only. Action: During a conflict at an [element-air] province, select one - either move this character to the conflict, or move it home.
name: Wandering Mediator

text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating character – that character gets -1 [conflict-military] until the end of the conflict for each facedown card in its controller's provinces.
flavorText: When the guests' breaths suddenly fell short, only the cooks could be blamed.
name: Paralyzing Delicacy

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is attacking, spend 1 fate and choose a triggered ability printed on the attacked province - resolve that ability as if you controlled the province, ignoring all triggering conditions.
flavorText: Poor in rice, yes. But rice is not our only wealth.
name: Countryside Trader

text: Void role only. Action: During the conflict phase, choose an opponent. If that opponent controls at least 4 faceup provinces - you may attack that player's stronghold this phase.
name: Scouted Terrain

text: Reduce the cost to play this card by 1 if it is played on a broken province. Attach to a province. Limit 1 Battlefield attachment per province. Reaction: After the conflict phase begins - discard each card in attached province.
name: Field of Ruin
